Risk Description: Terminated users may retain access if offboarding is delayed or not fully documented
Potential Impact: Unauthorized access to sensitive systems and data
Recommended Mitigation: Implement documented offboarding checklist and review disabled accounts weekly
Evidence Needed: Offboarding ticket and account disablement evidence

Risk Description: Users may have excessive permissions due to outdated group membership or role changes
Potential Impact: Privilege creep and unauthorized access to sensitive resources
Recommended Mitigation: Perform quarterly access reviews and validate RBAC assignments with managers

Risk Description: Endpoints may fall behind on required security patches
Potential Impact: Increased exposure to known vulnerabilities and malware
Recommended Mitigation: Track patch compliance and escalate overdue remediation items

Risk Description: Vulnerability findings may not have clear ownership or remediation due dates
Potential Impact: Delayed remediation and increased risk exposure
Recommended Mitigation: Assign owners and due dates for high-risk findings through ticketing system

Risk Description: New SaaS vendors may be adopted without documented security review
Potential Impact: Unreviewed vendor risk and potential exposure of sensitive data
Recommended Mitigation: Create vendor intake checklist requiring SOC 2 or security documentation review

Risk Description: Incomplete asset inventory may reduce visibility into hardware and software ownership
Potential Impact: Reduced accountability and audit readiness gaps
Recommended Mitigation: Maintain asset inventory and reconcile records during onboarding/offboarding

Risk Description: Security alerts may lack consistent documentation or escalation notes
Potential Impact: Reduced incident traceability and missed follow-up actions
Recommended Mitigation: Use standard alert triage template for security investigations

Risk Description: MFA or Conditional Access requirements may not be consistently applied across all systems
Recommended Mitigation: Review MFA coverage and document exceptions with business justification

Risk Description: Security exceptions may be approved informally without expiration dates
Potential Impact: Long-term control gaps and weak audit evidence
Recommended Mitigation: Create formal exception register with owner, approval, risk acceptance, and expiration date

Risk Description: Incident response roles and escalation paths may not be clearly documented
Recommended Mitigation: Document escalation process and conduct tabletop review
